target_section: Recent method papers — Experiential & procedural memory (agent learning from experience)
type_value: Safety-gated MCP architecture for RL coding-agent memory
tax_conflict_value: deterministic-ranker (production) + contextual-bandit shadow with conservative OPE gating
desc_value: Local-first MCP architecture for RL coding agents that treats memory selection as a logged contextual decision process. Three MCP tools: issue_match (ranks candidates + records telemetry), issue_feedback (maps raw labels to bounded rewards), issue_record_resolution (links resolutions to retrieval events). Deterministic ranker in production while a contextual-bandit residual policy runs in shadow mode behind off-policy-evaluation gates.
claims_value: 80.0% expected-decision accuracy; 100% hard-negative suppression; 11/11 static checks; 10/10 dynamic integration cases; 200-case deterministic dataset
